info.title: MemoryDataPlaneServer
info.description: API for managing Agentic Memory Service (AMS) data plane operations.

get.description: Return information about the operational status of the service.

delete.description: Deletes long-term memories in bulk by their IDs.

post.description: Runs a semantic search on long-term memory with filtering options.

get.description: Returns a long-term memory by its ID.

patch.description: Partially updates a long-term memory by its ID.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of session IDs for a store.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sessions to return.

schema.description: Maximum number of sessions to return.

post.description: Appends a single event to a session. Creates the session if it does not exist. If sessionId is omitted, the server generates one.

delete.description: Deletes the session memory for a session.

get.description: Returns the session memory for a session.

delete.description: Deletes a single event from a session by event ID.

get.description: Returns a single event from a session by event ID.

sessionId.description: Optional session ID. If omitted, the server generates a unique ID.

actorId.description: Unique actor identifier (1-255 chars). Can represent a user, agent, or any participant.

content.description: The message content as an array of typed content parts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event was created in milliseconds.

title.description:
A short, human-readable summary of the problem
                                      type.  It SHOULD NOT change from occurrence to occurrence of the
                                      problem, except for purposes of localization (e.g., using
                                      proactive content negotiation; see [RFC7231], Section 3.4).

status.description: The HTTP status code ([RFC7231], Section 6) generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.  It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

memories.description: List of memory records to create.

items.description: Memory record identifier (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes).

created.description: IDs of successfully created memory records.

errors.description: Errors for memory records that failed to be created.

items.description: Memory record identifier (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes).

memoryIds.description: List of memory record IDs to delete.

items.description: Memory record identifier (1-64 chars, alphanumeric and dashes).

deleted.description: IDs of successfully deleted memory records.

errors.description: Errors for memory records that failed to be deleted.

BulkOperationError.description: Error detail for a single item in a bulk operation.

id.description: Memory record ID of the item that failed.

Content.description: A single content item in a message. Exactly one member is set.

id.description: Client-provided memory record ID for idempotent creation.

sessionId.description: Session ID associated with this memory.

ownerId.description: Owner ID associated with this memory.

text.description: Text to use for semantic search.

similarityThreshold.description: The minimum similarity threshold for vector search results (normalized cosine similarity).

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

pageToken.description: Opaque token from a previous response for the next page.

nextPageToken.description: Opaque token for fetching the next page. Omitted when no more results.

SessionEvent.description: A single event in the session history.

ne.description: Not equal to the given value.

in.description: Matches any of the given values.

all.description: Matches all of the given values.
